title: Audit and update all C/Zephyr uses of IID and human address for consistency with SHA-256 derivation
description: Search lichen/ for IID derivation, human address, address construction. Ensure lichen_pubkey_to_iid, eui64 handling, and any display functions use the canonical SHA-256 method per spec/03-addressing.md. Fix any remaining keyed-hash or old derivations. Update comments referencing old project-LICHEN-swvz.
